screen.graffiti.title: Graffiti Editor
tooltip.graffiti.culling: Hides graffiti that is not in your field of view to improve FPS.
jei.graffiti.description:
Spray paint on any block face!

§7Right-click§r to open the color editor (HSB, HEX, brush size).
§7Left-click§r on a block face to paint.
Hold §7Ctrl + A/D§r to switch tools: Pencil, Eraser, Fill, Color Picker.

Graffiti syncs across players and persists on disk.
